testcases.input: tasks = [1,2,1,2,3,1], space = 3 Output: 9 Explanation: One way to complete all tasks in 9 days is as follows: Day 1: Complete the 0th task. Day 2: Complete the 1st task. Day 3: Take a break. Day 4: Take a break. Day 5: Complete the 2nd task. Day 6: Complete the 3rd task. Day 7: Take a break. Day 8: Complete the 4th task. Day 9: Complete the 5th task. It can be shown that the tasks cannot be completed in less than 9 days.
